goal: Get a first-time founder one visible thing on screen in under 10 minutes without USD/robotics lectures.
thoughts: Fastest credible path is a prebuilt template. Offer a pick list (warehouse / manipulation / AMR) phrased without robotics vocabulary, load the one he points at, then one sentence: press the Play triangle top-left. Zero USD/articulation concepts until something is on screen.
code:
starters = scene_aware_starter_prompts(
    user_goal="first pixel on screen, Tuesday customer demo",
    user_level="beginner"
)
templates = list_scene_templates(category="demo", difficulty="beginner")
# Present 3 options: warehouse / manipulation / AMR
pick = "<USER_CHOICE>"
load_scene_template(
    template_name=pick,
    target_path="/World"
)
# Fallback if he cannot decide:
# quick_demo(name="franka_pick_place")
failure_modes: Starting with USD / articulation / physics concepts before anything is on screen
Opening a blank stage and walking him through create_prim
Asking him to pick between 8 templates when 3 max is all he can process
